creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
I am currently at the location where we have our Epson scanner.

I've confirmed that it is working on FreeBSD-14.1 using both epsonscan2 command and using the sane interface.  scanimage -L is able to find it and can scan okay using the libsane-epsonscan2.so library installed by the graphics/epsonscan2 port.

That server is due to be upgraded to FreeBSD-14.2 and I will test again once that has happened.
